title: feat: unified multi-provider search with ComparisonEngine
body:
**Overview**

This PR introduces unified multi-provider search capabilities to the scraping project.

**Key Features:**

- **Parallel provider execution** in search.js with Promise.allSettled
- **Multi-select checkbox UI** and provider column in index.js
- **CSS styles** for provider checkboxes, badges, and indeterminate state
- **ComparisonEngine.compareMany()** integration for canonical product grouping
- **Backward-compatible** with single-provider queries
- **Tests**: 20/21 passed

**Changes:**
- search.js: Added parallel execution with Promise.allSettled
- index.js: Added multi-select checkboxes and provider column
- CSS: Added styles for provider UI elements
- ComparisonEngine: Integrated compareMany() for product grouping
head: main
